## Compliance Boundary

- [ ] Uses fictitious or non-sensitive example data
- [ ] Does not fabricate qualifications, cases, certificates, or personnel information
- [ ] Does not involve bid rigging, collusion, market manipulation, or unfair competition
- [ ] Keeps final decisions subject to manual review
